paper_title: Metabolomics Analysis and Metabolite Profiling of Closely Related Marine Sediment-Derived Streptomyces albogriseolus Strains

methods.description: This method involves analyzing the metabolite profiles in the extracts of four S. albogriseolus strains using high-performance liquid chromatography electrospray triple quadrupole mass spectrometry (HPLC-ESI-QQQ-MS) to understand the variation in biological activities among closely related Streptomyces species.

steps.description: Cultures of S. albogriseolus strains DSD040 T, DSD041 T, DSD042 T, and DSD043 T were extracted with EtOAc.
steps.searchable_summary: extract cultures of S. albogriseolus strains with EtOAc
outputs: EtOAc extracts of S. albogriseolus strains

steps.description: Analyzed by high-performance liquid chromatography electrospray triple quadrupole mass spectrometry (HPLC-ESI-QQQ-MS).
Triplicate profiles were combined for each strain for a comparative multivariate analysis and untargeted metabolite profiling.
steps.searchable_summary: combine triplicate profiles for multivariate analysis

steps.description: The principal component analysis (PCA) scores plot showed a variation in the chemical profiles of the four S. albogriseolus strains.
steps.searchable_summary: create PCA scores plot to show chemical profile variation

methods.method_name: High-Pressure Liquid Chromatography Mass Spectrometry (HPLCMS) and MS/MS Analysis
methods.description: This method describes the use of HPLCMS and MS/MS analysis to analyze GPC fractions and perform dereplication to identify metabolites.

steps.description: Dried GPC fractions were dissolved in LCMS grade methanol.
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve GPC fractions in LCMS grade methanol

steps.description: Performed on a Shimadzu TM LCMS-TQ 8045 instrument using a gradient elution system.
steps.searchable_summary: perform HPLCMS analysis using Shimadzu LCMS-TQ 8045

steps.description: MS/MS experiments were performed on the peaks of interest at 10 V to 70 V collision energy.
steps.searchable_summary: perform MS/MS experiments on peaks of interest

steps.description: The identity of the metabolites was obtained after comparison with a library search online workflow of GNPS through MASST Search Tool.
steps.searchable_summary: identify metabolites using GNPS MASST Search Tool
